# Katch

> AI voicemail and call screening app for Android and iOS. When you miss a call, Katch answers, has a real AI conversation with the caller, and sends you an instant text summary with their name, reason for calling, and urgency level. No new SIM required. Setup in 60 seconds via call forwarding on Jio, Airtel, or Vodafone. Free during beta.

## Core Pages
- [Katch Homepage](https://altorlab.org/): Main landing page and waitlist signup

- [Blog Index](https://altorlab.org/blog/): All articles

- [How Indian Founders Handle Calls](https://altorlab.org/blog/indian-founders-call-screening.html): 5 findings from the Indian founder community

## Key Facts
- Platform: Android (Play Store) and iOS (App Store)
- Pricing: Free during beta
- Setup time: 60 seconds, no new SIM required, no app for callers to install
- Carriers supported: Jio, Airtel, Vodafone Vi, BSNL
- AI conversation: Katch holds a live two-way conversation with callers — not a recording
- Notification: Push notification + optional WhatsApp/SMS summary
- Urgency detection: Flags calls with words like "urgent", "emergency", "bail", "immediately"
- Privacy: Call summaries and transcripts accessible only to the account holder

## Comparison
- vs Truecaller: Truecaller identifies who is calling (database lookup). Katch answers the call, has an AI conversation, and tells you WHO called AND WHY AND whether it is urgent.
- vs Regular Voicemail: Indian callers say "hello... hello..." and hang up without leaving messages. Katch holds a real conversation and extracts the caller's reason automatically.
- vs Google Voice: Google Voice is US-only and unavailable for Indian phone numbers. Katch works on Jio, Airtel, Vodafone, and BSNL.
- vs YouMail: YouMail transcribes voicemail boxes (US-centric). Katch answers calls live with AI conversation (works in India).
